prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年广西大学在天津市综合类最低录取位次分别为10670→10292→9863→9039→9165名，整体呈波动上升趋势（位次数字减小），2024年达到最低点9039名后 2025年小幅反弹至9165名，近两年趋于稳定在9000名附近；该校在天津市综合类招生计划2021–2025年均为15人，2026年大幅扩招至45人，增幅达200 %，扩招30人。如此显著的扩招将大幅拉低录取门槛，预计最低位次将出现明显后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 广西大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名持续上升，从20 21年第94名升至2026年第86名，排名稳步提升反映学校综合实力增强，对考生吸引力有所增加；该校在声誉文件中无显著负面舆情记录，声誉评价为中性/平稳；抖音热度排名第25位（较热），综合热度约183万，短视频平台曝光以校园活动、校友走秀等正面内容为主，对报考关注度有温和提振作用；第五轮学科评估 中广西大学无A-及以上等级学科收录，优势学科不突出，对高分考生吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校在天津招生专业以电气工程、计算机、电子科学、机械等工科为主 ，社会热度较高；天津市2026年高考考生总数约82000人，较2025年71938人增加约14%，考生规模扩大加剧竞争。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合202 6年招生计划从15人扩至45人（+200%）这一最大影响因素；同时考虑天津市考生总数增加14%带来的竞争加剧、学校软科排名持续上 升增强吸引力、抖音热度较热等正面因素，对基准值做小幅回调。预测2026年最低录取位次约20013名，区间19513–20513名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 电气工程及其自动化
- 计算机科学与技术。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子科学与技术
- 机械设计制造及其自动化。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 材料科学与工程
- 数学与应用数学
- 智能建造
- 化学工程与工艺（不招色盲色弱考生）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年广西大学在天津大幅扩招至45人，预计录取位次将显著后移至约20000名左右。位次在19500名以内的考生可重点冲刺一档电气工程、计算机等热门专业；位次在19500–205 00名之间的考生以二档电子科学、机械为主，兼顾一档冲刺；位次在20500名之后的考生可考虑三档专业保底，录取概率较大。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Guangxi University in Tianjin's comprehensive category were 10670 → 10292 → 9863 → 9039 → 9165, showing a fluctuating upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), reaching a low of 9039 in 2024 before a slight rebound to 9165 in 2025, stabilizing around 9000 in recent years. The enrollment plan for Guangxi University in Tianjin's comprehensive category was 15 students each year from 2021 to 2025, but in 2026 it will significantly expand to 45 students, an increase of 200%, adding 30 students. Such a notable expansion will greatly lower the admission threshold, and the minimum ranking is expected to shift significantly backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Guangxi University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been steadily rising, from 94th in 2021 to 86th in 2026, reflecting enhanced overall strength and increased attractiveness to candidates. There are no significant negative public records in the reputation file, with a neutral/stable reputation evaluation. Its Douyin popularity ranks 25th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.83 million. Short video platform exposure mainly features positive content such as campus activities and alumni runway shows, which has a mild boosting effect on application interest. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Guangxi University has no disciplines rated A- or above, with no prominent advantageous disciplines, limiting its appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The majors offered by the university in Tianjin are mainly engineering fields such as Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, Electronic Science, and Mechanical Engineering, which have high social popularity. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Tianjin college entrance examination is about 82,000, an increase of about 14% from 71,938 in 2025, intensifying competition due to the expanded candidate pool.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the biggest influencing factor of the 2026 enrollment plan expanding from 15 to 45 students (+200%), along with the 14% increase in Tianjin candidates intensifying competition, the rising Soft Science ranking enhancing attractiveness, and the relatively hot Douyin popularity as positive factors, a slight adjustment is made to the baseline. The predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 20013, with a range of 19513 to 20513.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Computer Science and Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Electronic Science and Technology
- Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials Science and Engineering
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics
- Intelligent Construction
- Chemical Engineering and Technology (not accepting candidates with color blindness or color weakness).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Guangxi University will significantly expand enrollment in Tianjin to 45 students, and the admission ranking is expected to shift significantly backward to around 20,000. Candidates with rankings within 19,500 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors like Electrical Engineering and Computer Science. Candidates with rankings between 19,500 and 20,500 should primarily target Tier 2 majors like Electronic Science and Mechanical Engineering, while also attempting Tier 1 majors. Candidates with rankings above 20,500 can consider Tier 3 majors as a safety option, with a higher probability of admission.
